rows.label: qev011101_MSG0001
rows.name: You're— An Earthling—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0002
rows.name:
I never thought I'd run into a
BLADE in a place like this. Seems
there's still some hope left—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Please... Could you help
me with an Arms mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev011101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what you need to help with.

rows.label: qev011101_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev011101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what Arms is.

rows.label: qev011101_JNK0030
rows.name: Admiration

rows.label: qev011101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Express admiration for his
devotion to the mission.

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0004
rows.name:
We were testing a new Doll weapon on the
native creatures around here per a request
from Sakuraba Heavy Industries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0005
rows.name:
—However, we were suddenly attacked
by a ferocious Mepites nearby.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0006
rows.name:
I thought it was explained when you
chose your Union, but did you forget?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Our job is to provide development
support for the Arms Company.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Arms offers assistance to further
corporate activities in various ways.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Of course, we are also involved in the
testing and manufacturing of new weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0010
rows.name:
The weapon you are using might be
one we had a hand in developing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0011
rows.name:
So, we were testing a new Doll weapon on
the native creatures around here per a
request from Sakuraba Heavy Industries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0012
rows.name:
—However, we were suddenly attacked
by a ferocious Mepites nearby.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm a BLADE too, however low-ranking.
It's only natural, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0014
rows.name:
We were testing a new Doll weapon on the
native creatures around here per a request
from Sakuraba Heavy Industries—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0015
rows.name:
However, we were suddenly attacked
by a ferocious Mepites nearby.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0016
rows.name:
BLADE members who weren't piloting Dolls
were slaughtered in a single strike...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0017
rows.name:
My Doll was destroyed, but I somehow
managed to eject and escape with my life—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0018
rows.name:
But the test data for the new
weapon remains inside the Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0019
rows.name:
To fail so miserably when we received this
request directly from Isobe-san, the chief
engineer at Sakuraba Heavy Industries—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0020
rows.name:
I was just thinking that I couldn't
possibly return to NLA like this
when I happened to run into you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0021
rows.name:
How about it? Could you retrieve
the new weapon's test data from the
Doll I abandoned in Rust Lake?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll give you the exact reward
we were scheduled to receive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0023
rows.name: Thank you. I'm counting on you—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'll go hide in a nearby cave.
Staying here might lead to
another native creature attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Investigate the Doll I left
in Rust Lake and retrieve the
new weapon's test data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0026
rows.name:
The Mepites that attacked us might
still be hanging around, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0027
rows.name: Please be extremely careful out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Thank you, you saved me. I never
thought I'd owe you my life as well—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0029
rows.name:
It seems there's no place to rest in
Nightglow Forest, not even inside a cave—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0030
rows.name:
By the way, how was the
test data? Was it intact?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Thank goodness. Yes,
this is definitely it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0032
rows.name:
The Doll was heavily damaged,
but this is all I need. You
have my deepest gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_JNK0040
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev011101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what kind of new weapon it is.

rows.label: qev011101_JNK0050
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev011101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Express concern over whether
he can deliver it safely to
Sakuraba Heavy Industries.

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'm sorry, but that's a corporate secret.
Isobe-san was very strict about that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Please look forward to when it lines the
store shelves. I'm sure you'll like it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0035
rows.name:
It's a short distance from here to the
exit of Nightglow Forest. I'm used to
Primordial Wilderness, so I'll be fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0036
rows.name:
Now then, I need to
hand over your reward—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0037
rows.name: It's quite the sum, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0038
rows.name:
Isobe-san had high expectations.
We faced the mission with high
morale to meet them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0039
rows.name:
The results were disastrous, but
at least I fulfilled the mission—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011101_MSG0040
rows.name: It's all thanks to you. Thank you.[ST:wait ]
